title: LG AI Research Proves Global AI Competitiveness as Korea Ranks Third
description: Korea ranked third globally in notable AI models in 2025, with LG AI Research placing among top institutions. The country also led in AI patents per capita for the second consecutive year.

title: AI, Empathy, and the Future of Immigration Law: My Visa Source’s Approach to Technology in Legal Services
description: When the internet arrived, immigration clients started showing up to consultations with printouts. They had read blogs, watched videos, and built their own working theory of how the immigration process applied to their situation. It changed the nature of the consultation. [...] The post AI, Empathy, and the Future of Immigration Law: My Visa Source’s Approach to Technology in Legal Services appeared first on Space Coast Daily .

title: LS Eco Energy Posts Record Quarterly Results Amid AI Data Center Boom
description: LS Eco Energy reported record Q1 results with revenue of 296.4 billion won and operating profit of 20.1 billion won, driven by 177% growth in extra-high voltage cable sales for AI data centers.

title: India's data centre market set to double to $22 billion by 2030, driven by AI and cloud demand
description: India's data centre market will more than double from $10 billion to $22 billion by 2030, driven by AI, cloud adoption, and 5G growth. Construction costs of $6-7M per MW-well below Singapore and Japan-are pulling in foreign investment.

title: Trump’s now-deleted AI portrayal as Jesus draws ‘blasphemy’ charge from Christian conservatives
description: Evangelical leaders and Maga influencers demand apology as Trump claims he thought the AI art depicted him as a “doctor”
